policy.catalogOwnership: Every reachable static string belongs to the shared locale catalog or to an explicitly declared fallback row.
policy.queryPersistence: Locale switching, root redirect, and refresh preserve the route query and selected view.
policy.authenticationBoundary: This localization artifact records the existing access context but never grants or expands anonymous access. Anonymous SPA access is limited by the runtime policy to the login and account-recovery flow; all other configured and unmatched routes require an authenticated session.

proofPolicy.assertionSemantics: Planned browser assertions describe the semantic E2E work that remains; their text is not execution evidence and cannot activate a locale.

routeFamilies.trigger: Open the configured section root and preserve the existing authentication boundary while routing to its default child.
routeFamilies.accessContext: authenticated-session-required except the /user redirect into the existing anonymous login flow

targetCoverage.ownership: route configuration and destination-page locale catalog
targetCoverage.structureAudit: exact configured-path closure and redirect ownership

plannedBrowserAssertions: each section root resolves to its configured child without expanding anonymous access

routeFamilies.trigger: Open the management page and traverse team, member, drawer, loading, empty, error, and action states.

targetCoverage.ownership: shared locale catalog and registry-derived content-language labels

plannedBrowserAssertions: team-management copy and content-language labels switch for every registry locale

rows.trigger: Open / or /?view=carbon-footprint; the route redirects to /welcome and keeps the query.
rows.accessContext: authenticated-session-required; anonymous access redirects to /user/login before protected content renders

targetCoverage.ownership: shared locale catalog after redirect
targetCoverage.structureAudit: exact topology, key, ICU, and route ownership

plannedBrowserAssertions: anonymous / reaches /user/login without rendering Welcome
authenticated / reaches /welcome while preserving the query

rows.trigger: Open /welcome directly or select the overview navigation action.
rows.accessContext: authenticated-session-required; localization proof for protected content runs with a valid session

rows.trigger: Open the exact query URL, follow the carbon-footprint action, switch locale, or refresh.

rows.trigger: Open any pathname not matched by a configured application route.
rows.accessContext: authenticated-session-required; anonymous unknown paths redirect to /user/login before the localized 404 can render

targetCoverage.ownership: shared locale catalog
targetCoverage.structureAudit: fail-closed anonymous-route policy plus authenticated localized wildcard rendering

plannedBrowserAssertions: anonymous unknown pathname reaches /user/login without rendering the 404
authenticated unknown pathname renders the localized 404 and Back Home action
